selectionPolicy: Police/state violence: Wikipedia unarmed African Americans killed by law enforcement; dual corroboration Guardian The Counted + Washington Post Fatal Force; curated historical cases.

Racial terror: SPLC Civil Rights Memorial / The Forgotten, NAACP/EJI-documented cases, Wikipedia lynching list rows marked African American, plus curated milestone civilian killings and racial terror massacres.
Milestone rule: civilian killings, assassinations, and massacres are included when they meaningfully served as a critical point in the Black story. Killer being a civilian does not exclude a name.
Deduped by lowercase name + year. Context phrases are memorial labels, not legal findings.
Nat Turner included as state_execution (executed after rebellion), not framed as a lynching victim.
